# T3 Overlay Order-Book Impact Sensitivity

Research-only order-book impact proxy for sizing candidates.

- Lead windows: `/Users/wuyaocheng/Downloads/bkTrader/research/entry_redesign/scripts/output/timing_probability_unified/t3_overlay_lead_exact_exposure/lead_exact_adverse10_exposure_windows.csv`
- Overlay windows: `/Users/wuyaocheng/Downloads/bkTrader/research/entry_redesign/scripts/output/timing_probability_unified/t3_overlay_lead_exposure_audit/t3_overlay_actual_exposure_windows.csv`
- Lead/overlay scaling is linear and diagnostic only.
- Impact bps are additional round-trip costs on allocated notional.
